name: Mishoshiru No-mi (Miso Soup Garnishes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the Wakame in a bowl of warm water for 15 minutes. When soft, strip the leaves from the tough central vein and discard it. Add sliced onions.
2. For tofu garnish: Drop the tofu into the simmering soup and cook for 1 minute. Pour into a bowl, garnish with onions, and serve.
3. Cut the daikon into strips (1/8 inch wide and 2 inches long), cover with cold water, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes until tender but firm. Drain the daikon and add it to the soup when it begins to simmer. Garnish with onions and serve.
4. For croutons garnish: Soak dried cutouts in cold water for 10 minutes until soft. Squeeze out moisture gently, bring the miso to a simmering point, drop the croutons, and cook for 1 minute. Pour into a bowl, add mustard, and serve.
